perturbation.original_text: ●All revenue sharing will be reconciled monthly and funds distributed by the 20th of each month by wire transfer for all net collected revenues for the previous month (net of returns and refunds, if any).
perturbation.changed_text: ●All revenue sharing will be reconciled monthly and funds distributed each month. The method of distribution will be determined at iMedicor's discretion.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the specification of 'wire transfer' and '20th of each month' along with '(net of returns and refunds, if any)', the method and timing of distribution become ambiguous. This creates an in-text contradiction because Section 2 details compensation and expects the 20th day payment, while this section now gives iMedicor full discretion. This could contradict the original intent and create uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ●USA MCO will have the option to take all or part of its revenue share in equity up to a maximum of 4.9% ownership in iMedicor on a fully diluted basis. For the purposes of this proposal, fully diluted means all issued and outstanding stock warrants priced at 15 times the average 5 day closing price at the day previous to reconciliation of revenues, which will be the 20th of the month for the prior calendar month. ●The iMedicor bookkeeping system will detail the payment option prior to releasing any funds or commitment of stock in order for USA MCO to determine how payment is to be reconciled. It is anticipated that said report will be available by the 15th of the month for previous activity, returned to iMedicor by the 19th in order to effect a timely disbursement of funds and or stock
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the specific method (wire transfer) and timing (20th of each month) for revenue sharing distributions. This contradicts the contradicted text, which states that revenue reconciliation will be on the 20th of the month for the prior calendar month. By giving iMedicor discretion over the method and timing, the changed text creates a direct conflict and uncertainty regarding the obligations stated in the contradicted section, creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: ●USA MCO will have the option to take all or part of its revenue share in equity up to a maximum of 4.9% ownership in iMedicor on a fully diluted basis. For the purposes of this proposal, fully diluted means all issued and outstanding stock warrants priced at 15 times the average 5 day closing price at the day previous to reconciliation of revenues, which will be the 20th of the month for the prior calendar month. ●The iMedicor bookkeeping system will detail the payment option prior to releasing any funds or commitment of stock in order for USA MCO to determine how payment is to be reconciled. It is anticipated that said report will be available by the 15th of the month for previous activity, returned to iMedicor by the 19th in order to effect a timely disbursement of funds and or stock ●It is understood that the issuance of stock certificates can take up to four weeks but the issue date will be the 20th of the month of reconcile.
perturbation.changed_text: ●USA MCO will have the option to take all or part of its revenue share in equity up to a maximum of 4.9% ownership in iMedicor on a fully diluted basis. The iMedicor bookkeeping system will detail the payment option prior to releasing any funds or commitment of stock in order for USA MCO to determine how payment is to be reconciled.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the definition of 'fully diluted basis' and the precise dates (15th, 19th, 20th), the text creates an in-text contradiction. The 'option to take all or part of its revenue share in equity' is still mentioned, but without defining 'fully diluted basis', its enforcement becomes uncertain. Furthermore, by removing the dates in this section, and how the payment option will be detailed, creates uncertainty in the section of the contract.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ●USA MCO will have the option to take all or part of its revenue share in equity up to a maximum of 4.9% ownership in iMedicor on a fully diluted basis. The iMedicor bookkeeping system will detail the payment option prior to releasing any funds or commitment of stock in order for USA MCO to determine how payment is to be reconciled.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the definition of 'fully diluted basis' and the specific dates related to revenue share reconciliation, creating a contradiction. The contradicted text, which is essentially a restatement of the changed text, now lacks the necessary context (definition of fully diluted and payment reconciliation dates), rendering the enforcement of USA MCO's option to take equity uncertain. This aligns with the Omissions – In Text Contradiction definition, as essential language has been removed, contradicting the implicit understanding of clarity required for contractual obligations elsewhere in the document.

perturbation.original_text: Thereafter, this Agreement shall be renewed automatically on a five (5) year basis, unless one party notifies the other of its desire to terminate this Agreement at least sixty 90 days prior to the expiration of the Initial Term or then current renewal term, as applicable, or unless a new Agreement is signed between the USA MCO and IMedicor which will then invalidate this Agreement. In such an instance, all compensation will continue for a extended period of five years from the date of termination for all subscriptions tagged as USA MCO.
perturbation.changed_text: Thereafter, this Agreement shall be renewed automatically, unless one party notifies the other of its desire to terminate this Agreement or unless a new Agreement is signed between the USA MCO and IMedicor which will then invalidate this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the clause on the duration of compensation continuation after termination for subscriptions tagged as USA MCO, but only removing that specific clause, we are causing a contradiction within the contract since it provides the opportunity for interpretation on how that will be handle since it is being tagged as USA MCO related termination. By removing the 'five (5) year basis' and 'at least sixty 90 days prior to the expiration of the Initial Term or then current renewal term, as applicable', the contract creates uncertainty, since there is an agreement binding the success of the agreement and any termination of it, and due to the contract talking about compesations it creates uncertainty in which parameters this will be handled. This omission creates an in-text contradiction, since by stating how that part is handled, and removing especific parameters, this is no longer clear.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Thereafter, this Agreement shall be renewed automatically, unless one party notifies the other of its desire to terminate this Agreement or unless a new Agreement is signed between the USA MCO and IMedicor which will then invalidate this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes specific details about the renewal term duration ('five (5) year basis') and the notification period for termination ('at least sixty 90 days prior to the expiration of the Initial Term or then current renewal term'). This omission creates a contradiction by removing clarity and introducing uncertainty regarding the terms of renewal and termination, particularly concerning compensation related to USA MCO subscriptions, as outlined in the original text and implicitly referenced in the contradicted text. The original text provided specific parameters, while the changed text removes them, leading to potential disputes and enforceability issues.
